tools.name: iva_perception_calculate
tools.description: Compute the VAT perception for a sale invoice (calcular percepción de IVA, the extra charge added on top of IVA). Returns 0 with a `waiverReason` when the buyer is exento / monotributista / consumidor

tools.name: iva_perception_build_ddjj
tools.description: Assemble the monthly SIRE perception return (armar DDJJ SIRE de percepciones de IVA) with per-regime and per-buyer breakdowns. Pure aggregation.

tools.name: iva_perception_submit_ddjj
tools.description: Submit an assembled SIRE perception return (presentar DDJJ de percepciones de IVA). Throws unless the host wired a real adapter. Files a tax return, confirmation gate required.
